chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-735 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A No.3268/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.08.2025. Mr. Sameeullah Rind, Advocate for Respondent No.5. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Sindh. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Addl: P.G a/w Inspector/I.O Nabi Bux. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate is present alongwith Petitioner and files Vakalatnama on behalf of Petitioner (Mst. Mir Zadi), which is taken on record. Through the Petition in hand, the Petitioner seeks Quashment of FIR bearing crime No.125 of 2025, stay of its operation, change of investigation, restraining the respondents from illegal harassment & interim relief for not taking coercive action against her. The crux of the case are that on 25.04.2025 an FIR bearing crime No.125 of 2025 was lodged by complainant (Ali Nawaz) at PS Sakrand District Shaheed Benazirabad U/s 364 PPC alleging an abduction regarding his brother namely Hamza @ Neko Chahwan aged about 45 years at the hands of Petitioner & other accused persons. Subsequently, on 28.04.2025 on the pointation of complainant a dead body was recovered from Banana orchid, therefore, Section 302 & 201 PPC were also added. Hence, the Petitioner has preferred the instant Petition. Today, the Respondent No.3 (SHO PS Sakrand, District Shaheed Benazirabad) has submitted report, which reflects that on 29.04.2025 two accused persons namely Muharram & Shoukat were arrested and had been produced before the concerned Trial Court. Page 2 of 2 At this juncture, the Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the Petition with a request to convert instant petition into protective bail enabling the petitioner to approach the Trial Court for Bail.

Today, the Respondent No.3 (SHO PS Sakrand, District Shaheed Benazirabad) has submitted report, which reflects that on 29.04.2025 two accused persons namely Muharram & Shoukat were arrested and had been produced before the concerned Trial Court. Page 2 of 2 At this juncture, the Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the Petition with a request to convert instant petition into protective bail enabling the petitioner to approach the Trial Court for Bail. Since, the case is under investigation and now two Sections i.e. 302 & 201 PPC have also been added, therefore, the Petition in hand is hereby converted into Protective Bail. The protective bail for a period of Fifteen days from today is granted to the Petitioner (Mst. Mir Zadi) subject to her furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiration of Fifteen days, or when the Petitioner surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. And during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case the Petitioner fails to appear/surrender before the concerned Trial Court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by her before this Court shall automatically stand forfeited. The Petitioner/ accused (Mst. Mir Zadi) is directed to cooperate with the Investigating Officer and record her statement as per law for the trial to proceed expeditiously. Since, the order dated 08.05.2025 is creating hindrance into speedy Trial of the matter, the same is hereby modified to the extent of Petitioner, directing Petitioner to appear before the Trial Court and seek bail. In the meantime, the Petitioner is further directed to join the Investigation and her statement be recorded as per law. The learned trial Court is directed to decide the Bail Application if filed by the Petitioner without being influenced from the observations made hereinabove. This Petition along with pending Application(s) stands disposed of in the above terms.

The learned trial Court is directed to decide the Bail Application if filed by the Petitioner without being influenced from the observations made hereinabove. This Petition along with pending Application(s) stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
